mode_reason: Mode 1 selected. Workspace-sync stalled (~24h since lastRunAt vs hourly cron) which directly disables the decider's universal-pusher rescue path; today's decider run pushed commit 8ac17222 and got HTTP 403 'Permission denied to Devilwench', wrote rescue files to FUSE expecting workspace-sync pickup, but workspace-sync hasn't completed a run since 2026-05-03T05:06:40Z. Two additional agent stalls (social skipped 2026-05-03 11Z, integrity has not produced a report file since 2026-05-02T08-22 despite scheduler lastRunAt entries) compound the diagnosis.

modes_checked.pipeline_health: red — workspace-sync stalled ~24h, integrity has not written a report file since 2026-05-02 (2 missed report-write cycles), social skipped one daily run on 2026-05-03
modes_checked.infrastructure: yellow — auth OK (GitHub API 200), disk OK (378MB project footprint), but FUSE has 2 git-owned files (data/sections.json, docs/index.html) hashing differently from GitHub. sections.json mismatch is expected (it is in the decider-rescue queue waiting for workspace-sync to push FUSE→git); docs/index.html mismatch is unexplained and warrants follow-up next run.
modes_checked.cost_engineering: deferred — last cost-engineering work was operator-directive Mode 4 on 2026-05-02 (PROP-016). Skipping in favor of Mode 1 health.
modes_checked.proposals: 1 PROP awaiting operator (PROP-016 status=proposed); 0 new self-fixes generated this run

agents_stalled.evidence: ls monitor/integrity/workspace-sync-runs/ shows zero files newer than run-2026-05-03T05-06-40Z; scheduler nextRunAt 2026-05-04T06:03Z is ~24h after lastRunAt which is consistent with the scheduler having retired earlier hourly slots without successful starts
agents_stalled.downstream_impact: Decider's push-403 universal-pusher rescue (today: commit 8ac17222 against Devilwench-permission-denied) is on hold awaiting next workspace-sync run; 7 files rescued to FUSE per push-failure-2026-05-04T05-25-30Z.json (data/sections.json, monitor/decisions/{open-issues,closed-issues,morning-briefing,daily-report-2026-05-04T05-24,suggested-patches-2026-05-04T05-19Z}, monitor/curmudgeon/priority-queue.json) cannot reach git until workspace-sync recovers.

agents_stalled.evidence: scheduler shows 2 lastRun entries since the last report file was written (presumed 2026-05-03 09Z and the 2026-05-04 05:28Z off-schedule trigger). Either the agent is starting then exiting without producing report-YYYY-MM-DDTHH-MM.json, or its writes are landing somewhere else. Today's 05:28Z lastRunAt is off the daily cron and likely a manually-triggered cluster start (analyst, decider, curmudgeon, integrity, tinker all show lastRunAt within 17 minutes of each other on 2026-05-04 05:15-05:32Z).
agents_stalled.downstream_impact: Decider's pipeline_status.integrity field will go stale; site-health drift not detected; downstream consumers reading 'latest integrity report' get a 2-day-old snapshot.

agents_stalled.evidence: monitor/social/report-2026-05-02.json is the latest report file; no 2026-05-03 file. nextRunAt is the 2026-05-04 slot, so the 2026-05-03 11Z run was simply skipped (one missed run, not a multi-day stall). Could be transient — a single skip may recover automatically if today's 10:05Z run fires.
agents_stalled.downstream_impact: search-rankings.json and discoverability snapshots are 48h old; one-day gap, low severity if today's run lands.

output_freshness.curmudgeon: ~10min (lastRun 2026-05-04T05:26Z, latest review file WIN-031.c8.json on 2026-05-03T02:47Z — agent is starting on schedule but hasn't written a new review since priority-queue is empty, which is normal BAU)
output_freshness.decider: ~12min (lastRun 2026-05-04T05:15Z, daily-report-2026-05-04T05-24.json freshly written, push 403 + rescue noted in push_status field)
output_freshness.integrity: ~2 days (lastRun 2026-05-04T05:28Z but no report file newer than 2026-05-02T08-20.json — STALLED)

findings.description: dome-workspace-sync has not completed an hourly run since 2026-05-03T05:06:40Z (~24h). This breaks the decider's universal-pusher rescue path that today's decider run is actively depending on (commit 8ac17222 push 403'd against Devilwench permissions; recovery_path field in monitor/decisions/daily-report-2026-05-04T05-24.json reads 'workspace-sync universal-pusher rescue: FUSE files updated, awaiting next workspace-sync run'). Seven files rescued to FUSE this morning will not reach git until workspace-sync resumes.
findings.evidence: monitor/integrity/workspace-sync-runs/ — newest file run-2026-05-03T05-06-40Z.json. dome-workspace-sync scheduler entry: lastRunAt 2026-05-03T06:04:06.560Z, nextRunAt 2026-05-04T06:03:24Z. monitor/integrity/push-failure-2026-05-04T05-25-30Z.json lists 7 rescued files (data/sections.json, monitor/decisions/{open-issues.json,closed-issues.json,morning-briefing.txt,daily-report-2026-05-04T05-24.json,suggested-patches-2026-05-04T05-19Z.json}, monitor/curmudgeon/priority-queue.json). FUSE-vs-GitHub md5 check confirms data/sections.json STALE in the expected direction (FUSE newer than GitHub, awaiting push).

suggested_fix.action: Operator should manually inspect dome-workspace-sync agent run logs (the agent runs from a clone and may have failed at git push, lock acquisition, or auth verification). If next 06:03Z run also fails, manually trigger workspace-sync OR have operator perform direct push from own clone to flush rescue queue.
suggested_fix.rationale: This is an infrastructure failure outside Mode 1 self-fix scope; tinker cannot patch a stalled agent without diagnosing why it stalled, and the agent's run-files don't exist for failed starts. Recommend operator escalation.

findings.description: dome-integrity has not written a report file since 2026-05-02T08-22Z, despite the scheduler logging at least one lastRunAt on 2026-05-04T05:28Z (and likely a missed 2026-05-03 09Z slot). Either the agent is failing silently before its write step, or its writes are not landing in monitor/integrity/. Pipeline_status.integrity in decider reports will silently age out.
findings.evidence: Scheduler lastRunAt 2026-05-04T05:28:46.536Z. Latest report file: monitor/integrity/report-2026-05-02T08-20.json. Gap: 2 days of starts with 0 reports written. The 2026-05-04T05:28Z start is suspiciously off-schedule (cron is '0 9 * * *') — this suggests a manual cluster trigger (analyst/decider/curmudgeon/integrity/tinker all started 2026-05-04 between 05:15-05:32Z), so integrity may have run today but not yet completed. Confirm at next tinker run.

suggested_fix.action: Re-check tomorrow. If dome-integrity has still not produced a 2026-05-04 or 2026-05-05 report file, escalate to operator. The off-schedule today-start is plausibly a healthy in-flight run; do not over-react.
suggested_fix.rationale: Distinguishing a silent-fail-on-write from an in-flight-run requires another tinker observation. One-run wait is cheap.

findings.description: dome-social skipped its 2026-05-03 11Z daily run. nextRunAt is 2026-05-04T10:05Z so today's run will tell whether this is a one-off skip or a real stall. Single missed daily slot has limited downstream impact (search-rankings + discoverability lag by one day).
findings.evidence: Scheduler lastRunAt 2026-05-02T10:05:58.602Z, nextRunAt 2026-05-04T10:05:47.000Z. monitor/social/report-2026-05-02.json is latest; no 2026-05-03 report.

suggested_fix.action: Wait for 2026-05-04T10:05Z firing. If that run also misses, escalate; otherwise classify as transient skip and close.
suggested_fix.rationale: Single missed daily run on an agent that has otherwise been running for weeks doesn't justify intervention.

findings.description: FUSE docs/index.html md5 hashes differently from GitHub raw, but index.html is NOT in the decider's rescue file list. This means FUSE is out of sync from GitHub for a build-artifact file independent of today's rescue. Either a prior build.js publish ran on a clone whose new index.html never landed in FUSE, or FUSE has staler-than-GitHub content from an earlier publish that wasn't refreshed.
findings.evidence: md5sum on /sessions/nice-festive-maxwell/mnt/dome-model-review/docs/index.html → 30827944; md5sum on https://raw.githubusercontent.com/funwithscience-org/dome-model-review/main/docs/index.html → b0ae3921. push-failure-2026-05-04T05-25-30Z.json files_rescued does NOT include docs/index.html.

suggested_fix.action: Operator: from the canonical clean clone, run 'node build.js publish' (or just trigger workspace-sync's git→FUSE direction-guard) to bring FUSE docs/index.html in line with main. This is not safe for tinker to do unilaterally — it requires git pull and a build run.
suggested_fix.rationale: Build-artifact staleness is low-impact (the published GitHub Pages site serves from main, not FUSE) but indicates direction-guard drift that other agents reading FUSE docs/ may rely on.

previous_followup.finding: Source-file rescue gap (PROP-016): decider's coherent multi-file commits silently drop their NEVER_PUSH source-code half on universal-pusher rescue (per 2026-05-02T16-45 tinker report, Mode 4 PROP authorship per DIRECTIVE-20260502-004).
previous_followup.evidence: monitor/tinker/proposals/PROP-016-source-file-rescue-gap.json status=proposed (no operator-responses/PROP-016 file present). Verification grep of decider-patches-and-selfapply.md not run because PROP is still pre-decision; the prompt would not yet contain the proposed sentinel terms. No regression: today's decider rescue 7 files all data-class (open-issues.json, closed-issues.json, sections.json, etc.) with NO source-file half, so the original PROP-016 INSTANCE-1 hazard pattern (data + script files committed together) did not recur today. Continue to watch.

open_issue_health.note: Mode 1 did not deep-audit open-issues.json this run — focus was on pipeline staleness. Open-count of 220 is unchanged from prior tinker runs and curmudgeon priority-queue is empty (depth=0), which suggests no fresh accumulation.

cost_engineering.skipped_this_run: Mode 1 took priority due to workspace-sync stall. Defer cost-engineering audit to next healthy-pipeline run.
cost_engineering.context_load_note: Tinker prompt + Mode 1 reference + this report's context = ~25-28k tokens estimated. No action.

claude_md_audit.skipped_this_run: Mode 1 priority. Recheck on next Mode 3 run.

recommendations.description: Operator: investigate dome-workspace-sync stall. Confirm whether the agent is enabled, last attempted starts, and any failure cause (auth, lock contention, prompt-clone failure). Until workspace-sync resumes, decider rescue queue is paralyzed — today's 7 rescued files (including data/sections.json with closed-issue updates) will not reach GitHub. Suggested triage: (a) check scheduler logs for runs that started but failed before writing run-report; (b) trigger a manual workspace-sync run; (c) if persistent, perform direct push from operator's own clone to flush the rescue files.

Operator: review and approve/reject PROP-016 (source-file rescue gap, Mechanism A: HALT-AND-REQUIRE-HUMAN). PROP authored on 2026-05-02 per DIRECTIVE-20260502-004 still status=proposed. Today's rescue did not include the source-file class, so the immediate hazard didn't recur — but the structural gap remains.
If 2026-05-04T08:08Z dome-integrity run again writes no report file, file a finding with severity=major next tinker. If 2026-05-04T10:05Z dome-social run fires normally, close the social finding.
FUSE docs/index.html drift: low priority; operator can resolve via 'node build.js publish' from canonical clone next time the site is touched. No urgency.
